_comment: Lightweight multi-lineage archive. A lineage is defined by its CORE MECHANISM, never by parameter values ('geometry-aware ray reasoning', not 'lr_3e4'). A method may FAIL to become global champion yet PASS as a hypothesis if it shows a clear effect, a reproducible metric specialisation, a meaningful trade-off, or recombination value. Conversely a tiny metric gain does not make a hypothesis scientifically strong. Per-run results stay in out/results.tsv; study-level conclusions in out/hypothesis*.tsv; this file only tracks champions and lineage state.
comparability_note: The depth target changed RADIAL -> PLANAR at commit 87b3047. Metrics recorded before that commit are NOT comparable to metrics after it. The 2026-June champion below is retained as historical evidence under the OLD target and must never be compared numerically against this phase's runs.

batvision-reference.mechanism: plain pix2pix/CycleGAN unet_256 encoder-decoder; the reference number my model must beat
batvision-reference.role: reference (not a candidate for global champion; it is the bar, not the runner)

champion.name: batvision_5ch_win64_hop16
champion.note: Best batvision composite so far, but its cause is UNRESOLVED: E6 changes temporal smear, staircase fineness and frequency resolution simultaneously (see D7, I1 confound). A score, not yet a mechanism. Note E6 is NOLOG -- log adds ~0.008 independently (S0), so a log x win64 combine is an obvious candidate once the cause is known.

batvision-reference.metric_profile: Dissociation: interaural cues buy d1 (angle, +0.015); log1p buys rmse (range, -0.010). Additive, no interaction.

raydpt-baseline.mechanism: ray-conditioned DPT: per-ray RayBank queries x audio cross-attention, depth decoded per ray direction
raydpt-baseline.role: my model; the architectural invariant of this project
raydpt-baseline.status: anchored (E4), COMPUTE-STARVED under the wall-clock budget

champion.name: raydpt_e4_planar
champion.note: ANCHOR, not a verdict. Only 5 epochs fit the 1h budget (batvision fits 25); the best checkpoint is the LAST epoch and every val metric was still improving. Do NOT read the 2.0471-vs-1.8567 gap as an architectural result -- see D5.

raydpt-baseline.dead_parameters: e5..e8 = 16.78M of 24.44M (68.7%): built by UNet8Encoder, never used in forward, receive no gradient. See I9.

acoustic-representation.mechanism: what the network is shown: STFT analysis window, cue set, and the resize of the (freq,time) grid
acoustic-representation.status: probing; I1's range mechanism refuted, I10 pending
acoustic-representation.open_question: Is the gain temporal resolution, sampling density, or the nearest-neighbour staircase? I10 decides.

2026-June-RayDPT-improvement.mechanisms: multi-res STFT + interaural coherence + eval-time L/R-flip TTA
2026-June-RayDPT-improvement.note: Historical evidence only. Recorded under the radial target and the pre-fix coarse/low loss; NOT numerically comparable to the current phase. Its mechanisms are candidates for re-validation, not established results.

informative_failures.mechanism: predict the smooth radial field, multiply by the fixed linf = max(|dx|,|dy|,|dz|) field to recover planar depth
informative_failures.verdict: DROP (refuted before any GPU time was spent)
informative_failures.classification: mechanism unsupported -- the premise itself is false
informative_failures.evidence: grad-energy over 24 samples / 6 scenes: planar 0.01618 vs radial 0.01677; radial smoother in only 17% of samples (mean ratio 1.035).
informative_failures.scope: Refutes THIS reparameterisation under the planar target on SoundSpaces rooms, which are mostly axis-aligned (a wall perpendicular to a cube face has constant planar depth, while radial curves as 1/cos). It does NOT license the conclusion that geometry-conditioned heads are useless in general, and says nothing about non-axis-aligned scenes.
informative_failures.recombination_value: The measurement itself is the asset: it establishes that the planar target is piecewise-constant, which is what makes decoder output resolution (I2) worth testing.

study_conclusions.S0: PASS. Reference anchored at composite 1.8567 (E3). Cues->angle, log->range, additive. Predicted log x channel-count interaction refuted.
